message:
feat(loom): add comprehensive loom concurrency tests for scheduler

11 loom tests verifying Parker, wake state, and local queue protocols
are free from lost wakeups, double scheduling, and deadlocks. Fixed
begin_poll() to use CAS instead of blind store to prevent clobbering
NOTIFIED state. Also fixed state.rs destructuring mismatches.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
